branch.frontier_task_title: Implement resource claim and policy gate integration
branch.branch_summary: Start TASK-052 by connecting actor assignment evaluation to resource claims and policy gate evidence, so selected actors cannot execute governed work unless required resources and policies are explicit.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-052 sits on v5.0 after shipped v4.0.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-052: Implement resource claim and policy gate integration
